mapper.select: select id, parent_id, name, code, sort, status, version from sys_department order by sort asc, id asc
select id, parent_id, name, code, sort, status, version from sys_department where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_department (id, parent_id, name, code, sort, status, version) values (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{version})
mapper.update: update sys_department set status = #{status}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_department where parent_id = #{id}
select count(1) from sys_user where department_id = #{id}
mapper.update: update sys_department set sort = #{sort}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id}
